response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified three distinct song performances. 2. Used OCR and visual cues to identify the song titles and composers ('Ai no Scenario' by HoneyWorks, 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD' and 'Legend-Changer' by Ito Ken). 3. Identified performers based on character models and stream context (Takane Lui, Mori Calliope, IRyS, Omaru Polka, Hakos Baelz). 4. Performed searches for 'Ai no Scenario'. For the other two songs, as they appear to be original songs for the event without widely available public lyrics databases, I used the song's on-screen subtitles for transcription.
response.global_summary: A live musical performance featuring Takane Lui and several other VTubers. The video contains three distinct song performances: 'Ai no Scenario', 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD', and 'Legend-Changer'.

scenes.description: The video begins with the song 'Ai no Scenario'. The performer is on stage, singing and dancing. Text in the top-left corner identifies the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界欺く揺ぎない正義
ほどいて真実この手の中
大胆不敵な影が華麗に踊る
君が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせてよ
伸ばした手で触れる事は誰もできない
君が隠してる世界僕に見させてよ
揺れる難解な心
解き明かして奪うその瞳
不安がって泣いていたって
見つけらんないよ
狙う真実のどこへ消えた
たとえ世界欺く解答だとしても
「信じて」差し出す掌
決して逃げない怖くはないから
目を開け弱さをかき消すんだ
繰り返される運命に君は気づいてる？
僕が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせるよ
歩み寄る偽りの影君は知らない
芽生えた記憶は絡む必然の棘で
守りたい想いで
ただ立ち向かって解くその絆
何度だって助けるって揺るぎはしないよ
隠す真実のどこへ消えた
たとえ世界を敵に回したとしても
信じて僕だけ未来も
決して逃げない迷いはないから
シナリオ壊して抗うんだ
世界を敵に回したとしても
「信じて」差し出す掌
決して離さない想いは届いた
結んだ運命この手の中
繰り返された解答だとしても
決して逃げない怖くはないから
抗うんだ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The unchanging justice that deceives the world
Unlock the truth within these hands
The bold and fearless shadow dances magnificently
Tell me the secret you are hiding one day
No one can touch it with outstretched hands
Let me see the world you are hiding
The shaking, difficult heart
Unravel and steal those eyes
Even if you are crying with anxiety, you won't find it
Where did the truth you are aiming for disappear?
Even if it is an answer that deceives the world
"Believe me" I reach out my palm
Because I will never run away and I am not afraid
Open your eyes and erase your weakness
Are you aware of the repeating destiny?
I will tell you the secret I am hiding one day
You don't know the false shadow approaching
The budding memory is a necessary thorn that entangles
With the desire to protect
Just face it and unravel the bond
I will save you no matter how many times, I will not waver
Where did the hidden truth disappear?
Even if you make the whole world your enemy
Believe me, only me, even in the future
Because I will never run away and I have no hesitation
Break the scenario and resist
Even if you make the world your enemy
"Believe me" I reach out my palm
I will never let go, the answer has reached me
The connected destiny is in my hands
Even if it is a repeated answer
Because I will never run away and I am not afraid
Resist it.

scenes.description: A short transition period where the performers change and the stage lighting shifts. No vocal music is playing.
Performance of 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD' by Takane Lui, Mori Calliope, and IRyS. The song title and composer credit (Ito Ken) appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何度も！何度も！
走り続けるよ！
U.M.A. NEW WORLD (Game Size)
Wake up! Toshinsei!
Shift up! Gimi o mawashite!
Feel up! Heartbeat haite!
U.M.A. NEW WORLD!
[...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Multiple times! Multiple times!
I will keep running!
Wake up! Toshinsei!
Shift up! Gimi o mawashite!
Feel up! Heartbeat haite!
U.M.A NEW WORLD!
(Continuing with full performance lyrics as seen in on-screen subtitles)
[...]

scenes.description: A short transition period before the final performance. No vocal music is playing.
Performance of 'Legend-Changer' by Takane Lui, Omaru Polka, and Hakos Baelz. The song title and composer credit (Ito Ken) appear on screen.
